name: The Joe Grate Sports Complex
description: The Joe Grate Sports Complex is a place to play pickleball in Carthage, IL. There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.

name: Warsaw Tennis Courts
description: Warsaw Tennis Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Warsaw, IL. There are 3 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include water.
